---
title: "Productivity with Just"
---

The `just` command-line runner provides a clean method to manage daily development shortcuts without Makefile complexities.

## Sample Workflow

Below is a baseline flowchart tracking execution sequences:

```{mermaid}
graph TD
    A[Run: just target] --> B{Target valid?}
    B -- Yes --> C[Execute target recipes]
    B -- No --> D[Halt process]
```
